name: DHIS2
description: Open-source health information management platform used for aggregate reporting, individual-level tracker data, and health program management. Deployed as the national health information system in over 70 countries.

name: OpenMRS
description: Open-source electronic medical record system designed for resource-constrained environments. Supports clinical encounters, patient tracking, and integration with laboratory and pharmacy systems.

name: OpenHIE
description: Open Health Information Exchange architecture framework and community. Provides interoperability standards and reference implementations for connecting health information systems at the national level.
